name: nopCommerce .NET E-Commerce API
what_it_does: Open-source ASP.NET e-commerce platform with REST API — enabling .NET development teams to build fully customized online stores with products, orders, customers, payments, shipping, discounts, and multi-store support, with a plugin architecture, extensive documentation, and integration with Microsoft ecosystem tools.
use_cases: Managing nopCommerce products and categories via REST API for catalog automation
Processing nopCommerce orders via API for order management and fulfillment automation
Managing nopCommerce customers and addresses via API for CRM integration
Integrating nopCommerce with ERP systems via API for inventory and order synchronization
Building headless nopCommerce storefronts via API for decoupled frontend applications
not_for: Teams without .NET expertise (nopCommerce is ASP.NET Core — requires C# knowledge)
Non-Microsoft hosting environments (best on Windows Server or Linux with .NET runtime)
Simple stores needing quick SaaS setup (use Shopify or BigCommerce)
best_when: A .NET development shop or Microsoft-ecosystem team needs a fully customizable open-source e-commerce platform — where the ASP.NET Core architecture, extensive plugin marketplace, and Microsoft ecosystem integration justify the .NET stack.
avoid_when: You don't have .NET/C# expertise, prefer non-Microsoft stack, or need managed SaaS e-commerce.

auth.notes: REST API via nopCommerce Web API plugin (official, paid). Bearer token auth. Plugin-based API — not in core nopCommerce. Admin token for management API. No OAuth2 in core — available via plugin. No webhooks in core — use plugin or ASP.NET event handlers. API keys per customer or admin. Self-hosted — user controls auth configuration.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Open source (nopCommerce Source Available License) — free for most uses
pricing.paid_tiers: nopCommerce Cloud from $49/month; Web API plugin $299/license; Enterprise support custom
pricing.notes: American company (nopSolutions). Created by Andrei Mazulnitsyn in 2008. Source Available License (not pure MIT — commercial use restrictions). GitHub: nopSolutions/nopCommerce (9,500+ stars). ASP.NET Core. Used by 60,000+ stores globally. Plugin marketplace (700+ plugins). Multi-store, multi-vendor, multi-language. Very popular in Microsoft-ecosystem shops. Third-party Web API plugin is the primary REST integration path. Microsoft Azure hosting integration. Strong in Eastern Europe and US SME market. Used by brands in retail, automotive, healthcare accessories.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API via paid Web API plugin — not in core. .NET/C# expertise required. No webhooks in core. Plugin-based ecosystem means API features require plugin installation. PCI-DSS compliance for payments. Self-hosted. Source Available license — check commercial restrictions.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Product reads idempotent by ID or SKU. Order reads idempotent by ID. Customer reads idempotent. Creation operations not idempotent — check by SKU/email first.
known_agent_gotchas: REST API requires paid Web API plugin ($299) — not in open source core
Source Available License — commercial use has restrictions (check for your use case)
No webhooks in core — requires plugin or custom ASP.NET event handlers
Plugin ecosystem quality varies — evaluate API plugin before production use

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced (ASP.NET Core default). User-controlled data residency. Bearer token auth via plugin. PCI-DSS compliance for payment handling. ASP.NET Core built-in security (anti-CSRF, XSS headers). Open source (Source Available) — auditable. Plugin security depends on plugin quality. Microsoft Azure hosting option provides enterprise security options.
